description_long: This is a single slip-on shoe with a vibrant magenta-pink upper, featuring a slightly textured, possibly fabric or synthetic surface. The shoe has a low profile and a rounded toe, with a seamless vamp and no visible laces or fasteners. The interior appears to be lined with a darker, smooth material, and the heel is reinforced with a vertical seam. The outsole is a contrasting off-white color, flat and likely made of rubber or a similar material, providing a casual and comfortable look. There are minor scuffs and marks on the toe and heel, indicating some light use. The overall design is simple, practical, and suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A magenta slip-on shoe with a textured upper and off-white flat sole, showing minor signs of wear. The design is casual and comfortable, with no laces or fasteners.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full magenta upper, seamless vamp, and off-white sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the vertical heel seam and the open, dark-lined interior.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with visible texture and clean lines.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded toe, textured upper, and slight scuffing at the tip.
